changeSet.author: fabric-dev
changeSet.comment: Seed placeholder header rows in FIELD_TEMPLATES for file type p327 (P327, ATOCTRAN, EAC, ESA, EST, TRANERT)
changeSet.sql: MERGE INTO CM3INT.FIELD_TEMPLATES ft USING ( SELECT 'p327' AS FILE_TYPE, 'P327' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'p327', 'ATOCTRAN' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'p327', 'EAC' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'p327', 'ESA' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'p327', 'EST' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'p327', 'TRANERT' FROM DUAL ) src ON (ft.FILE_TYPE = src.FILE_TYPE AND ft.TRANSACTION_TYPE = src.TRANSACTION_TYPE AND ft.FIELD_NAME = '__HEADER__') WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (FILE_TYPE, TRANSACTION_TYPE, FIELD_NAME, TARGET_POSITION, LENGTH, DATA_TYPE, REQUIRED, ENABLED, CREATED_BY, CREATED_DATE, VERSION) VALUES (src.FILE_TYPE, src.TRANSACTION_TYPE, '__HEADER__', 0, 0, 'String', 'N', 'Y', 'SYSTEM', SYSDATE, 1)

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM CM3INT.FIELD_TEMPLATES WHERE FILE_TYPE = 'p327' AND FIELD_NAME = '__HEADER__' AND CREATED_BY = 'SYSTEM'

changeSet.author: fabric-dev
changeSet.comment: Seed placeholder header rows in FIELD_TEMPLATES for file type atoctran (P327, ATOCTRAN, EAC, ESA, EST, TRANERT)
changeSet.sql: MERGE INTO CM3INT.FIELD_TEMPLATES ft USING ( SELECT 'atoctran' AS FILE_TYPE, 'P327' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'atoctran', 'ATOCTRAN' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'atoctran', 'EAC' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'atoctran', 'ESA' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'atoctran', 'EST' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'atoctran', 'TRANERT' FROM DUAL ) src ON (ft.FILE_TYPE = src.FILE_TYPE AND ft.TRANSACTION_TYPE = src.TRANSACTION_TYPE AND ft.FIELD_NAME = '__HEADER__') WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (FILE_TYPE, TRANSACTION_TYPE, FIELD_NAME, TARGET_POSITION, LENGTH, DATA_TYPE, REQUIRED, ENABLED, CREATED_BY, CREATED_DATE, VERSION) VALUES (src.FILE_TYPE, src.TRANSACTION_TYPE, '__HEADER__', 0, 0, 'String', 'N', 'Y', 'SYSTEM', SYSDATE, 1)

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM CM3INT.FIELD_TEMPLATES WHERE FILE_TYPE = 'atoctran' AND FIELD_NAME = '__HEADER__' AND CREATED_BY = 'SYSTEM'
